response.overview: Does Uphold hold your money? ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393  Yes, Uphold holds your money in a ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393 custodial account. 1-[850].600.1393  Fiat and cryptocurrency funds are stored on ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393 the platform, ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393  managed by Uphold on behalf of users. While funds are ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393 segregated and secured, ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393  users do not control ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393 private keys unless assets are ⭐️ +1-[850].600.1393 withdrawn to an external wallet.
